name: Sunday Italian Vegetable Soup
recipeIngredient: 1/2 cup Chick peas (garbanzo beans), drained canned
1/2 cup Rotini or other pasta, uncooked
recipeInstructions:
1. Cover navy beans with water in a large pot.
2. Over medium heat, bring just to the boiling point.
3. Remove pan from heat, cover, and let stand for 1 hour.
4. Drain. Add chicken broth, carrot, and potato. Cover and cook over medium heat until vegetables are almost tender, about 35 minutes.
5. Heat oil in a small skillet and sauté onion until tender. Add onion and all remaining ingredients to soup pot.
6. Cook 15 minutes or until pasta is cooked. Serve hot.
Food exchanges per serving: 2 STARCH EXCHANGES + 1 VEGETABLE + 1 FAT EXCHANGE.
CHO: 34g; PRO: 12g; FAT: 4g; CAL: 216;
Low-sodium diets: Omit salt. Substitute canned vegetables and broth.
